chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 979 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.02.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case None present for applicant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. along with SIP Ali Asghar Bhurgri PS B-Section Tando Allahyar. Learned D.P.G. has informed me that the applicants have been convicted and therefore, this bail application has become infructuous. He further submits that after the conviction by the Judicial Magistrate, Tando Allahyar, the applicant has appealed against that conviction order dated 28.10.2025 and that on 11.11.2025 the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Tando Allahyar acquitted the applicant. He has put on record copies of the two orders / judgment passed. Accordingly this bail application has become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
